title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Phoenix International Global UK Limited
body: "Application number 5368  Applicant Phoenix Group Management  Services Limited objected to the name used by Phoenix International Global UK Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 10 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Phoenix International Global UK Limited is changed to 16117367, Ltd. "
